author: bharath.vedartham
content:
Hey clients, some updates on the builder-api stuff: We have the spec at: https://github.com/ethereum/builder-specs/pull/138
After speaking to more builders on the spec, builders preferred to have a separate endpoint to submit per-builder preferences which I have specified at: https://github.com/ethereum/builder-specs/pull/160
We can think of the `ProposerPreferences` on the gossip topic to be the global preferences of a proposer like fee_recipient etc. And the builder preferences endpoint to contain per-builder preferences that a proposer has like the `max_trusted_bid` etc. 
Please do let me know what you folks think 🙂

author: bharath.vedartham
content: my next steps are to try to have a standard spec for builder flags like min-bid etc and also bid scoring here: https://github.com/ethereum/builder-specs/pull/144

author: bharath.vedartham
content:
I made some progress updating https://github.com/ethereum/builder-specs/pull/144
Some of the things done are:
1. Specify per-builder flags like bid_boost and max_trusted_bid
2. Specify some global flags like min_bid and local_block_boost
3. Logic to get the best bid across local, builder-api bids and p2p bids

author: bharath.vedartham
content: def not perfect but we can iterate on it
